response.justification: Strong generalist with 13+ years of full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and data-integration systems, plus recent exposure to MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq. However, the resume lacks demonstrated depth in production GenAI delivery — no explicit RAG, vector database, multi-agent framework (LangGraph/CrewAI), or cloud-native AI system experience at scale. AI work appears recent and infrastructure-adjacent rather than as a lead shipping production AI to enterprise customers, and there is no clear evidence of customer-facing technical discovery leadership. A screening call could clarify the depth of recent AI work and Python proficiency.
strengths: 13+ years shipping production software across diverse stacks including TypeScript/Node.js
Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, talks, courses, and founding an open-source platform
concerns: No explicit production experience with RAG, vector databases, or LLM evaluation/observability pipelines
Python not listed in skills; AI/GenAI exposure appears recent and limited in scope
No clear evidence of staff-level customer-facing discovery or enterprise cloud AI delivery

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agentic workflow work at re:cinq
